title: Amid Escalating Threats, U.S. and Iran Float Ideas to End War
summary_full: Both countries have offered plans that could form the basis of negotiations. So far, each side’s leaders have publicly dismissed the other side’s proposals.
summary_public: Both countries have offered plans that could form the basis of negotiations. So far, each side’s leaders have publicly dismissed the other side’s proposals.

IR.label: neutral
